highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.0 ships 71 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

breaking.title: Public API surface changed
breaking.body: The linked API-diff report for 3.116.0 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: (uno): Ensure that the canvas' context is active when rendering; (skxamlcanvas): [Wasm] Don't fail when the canvas can't be found; Restore nosimd builds for edge enhanced security and safari; XamlRoot may be null when the SKXamlCanvas is unloaded; feat: Add…
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable; Bring Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM; Function pointers and LibraryImport
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: SKXamlCanvas on Uno Skia to use Bgra8888; Provide Span overload for SetRectRadii; compatibility overloads for SKFilterQuality
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Revert SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to previous behavior (2.88.8)
contributor_summaries.taublast: Snapshot returning magenta color Apple Metal

preview_summaries.p6: Preview 6 carried support for multi-thread and/or SIMD WebAssembly; SKMatrix.MapPoints/MapVectors, SKPath.AddPoly  overloads with Span<SKPoint>; skia.
preview_summaries.p5: Preview 5 carried Revert SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to previous behavior (2.88.8); the new GLControl packages for WinForms; Function pointers and LibraryImport; SDK, workloads and projects; compatibility overloads for SKFilterQuality; sure ANGLE reaches the nugets; memory leaks in MAUI views; .NET to 8.0; Build ANGLE separately; Provide Span overload for SetRectRadii;….
preview_summaries.p4: Preview 4 carried AVE disposing cloned SKPaint; Do not stretch the background; the SKPaint.FilterQuality for the SamplingOptions in obsolete methods; SKXamlCanvas on Uno Skia to use Bgra8888; R-Tree overload of beginRecording; Re-generate APIs; the GetKerningPairAdjustments API; more SKPicture APIs; skia external; spans to the color filters; XamlRoot may be null when the SKXamlCanvas is….
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 carried Bring Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM; and remove the compatibility APIs; Expose Blazor components dpi; Snapshot returning magenta color Apple Metal; Clean up SKTextBlobBuilder and SKRunBuffer APIs; SKGLElement to SkiaSharp.Views.WPF; Unsafe.As for better perf; benchmarks project; a build using MSVC; comment.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried Bind Skottie's Animation Builder; the Vulcanized compiler options; Metal as a backend on Mac Catalyst; SKImage.ToRawShader; Do not provide invalid externs; Run APIScan after packaging on the packages; Don't put metadata in package versions; Correctly package managed runtime-only files.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried Reduce checkout size of submodules; Implemented SKGLView; support for WinUI accelerated views; PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable; Avoid async void in SKXamlCanvas; NuGet versions need to be < 64 characters; harfbuzz to 8.3.0; SkResources is skia_component not static_library; Revert the libjpeg-turbo update and roll back to 2.1.5.1; webp to 1.3.2; Restore nosimd….
